CustomField.formula: IF(OR(CONTAINS(TEXT(Industry),'Banking'), CONTAINS(TEXT(Industry),'Asset'), CONTAINS(TEXT(Industry),'Insurance - '), CONTAINS(TEXT(Industry),'Finance'), CONTAINS(TEXT(Industry),'P&C Insurance'), CONTAINS(TEXT(Industry),'Wealth')),'Financial Services','Core')
CustomField.inlineHelpText: Classification based on the Industry of the Account Core, Financial Services
CustomField.label: Vertical
